

# What Is Amazon Managed Streaming for Apache Kafka?
<a name="what-is-msk-replicator"></a>

Amazon Managed Streaming for Apache Kafka (Amazon MSK) is a fully managed service that makes it easy for you to build and run applications that use Apache Kafka to process streaming data.

This Amazon MSK Replicator API Reference describes Amazon MSK Replicator operations: CreateReplicator, DeleteReplicator, DescribeReplicator, ListReplicators, UpdateReplicationInfo.

Other Amazon MSK API references include:
+ [Amazon Managed Streaming for Apache Kafka API Reference 1.0](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/msk/1.0/apireference/what-is-msk.html)
+ [Amazon Managed Streaming for Apache Kafka API Reference 2.0](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/MSK/2.0/APIReference/what-is-msk.html)
+ [Amazon MSK Connect API Reference](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/MSKC/latest/mskc/Welcome.html)

For more information about Amazon MSK, see the *[Amazon MSK Developer Guide](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/msk/latest/developerguide/what-is-msk.html)*.
